## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- App version / commit: [e.g. v1.0.0]

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or logs here.
